Heaven is really full of enlightened persons of character, but even among them there are inferior ones like her. Still, that gives her an almost human feel. Turning it around, you might say she's an oasis within Heaven.

In the village it's said that the mountain's smoke isn't real smoke, but rather fumes that spew from factories run by the tengu and the kappa... However, the human that lived in the bamboo forest knew.

cards.flavor_text: [i]Youkai create trouble, and humans defeat them. This repeating cycle is the foundation of Gensokyo's balance.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Reach
[i]Divine Virtues of the Wind God[/i] — Whenever a land you control enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain flying until end of turn.
You may play land cards from your graveyard.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The outside world had no more need for gods, but the gods had need for faith. In Gensokyo she found a hidden world where gods were still revered, and sought to stand at its peak.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Reach
[i]Kappa's Pororoca[/i] — When Nitori enters, draw two cards, then discard a card.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The kappa of the ravine are shy by nature. Although they interact with humans rarely, the kappa watch them often via stealth, and like to think they're on good terms with each other.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Vigilance
This creature can't be blocked by legendary creatures.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The tengu of the mountain allow no outsiders in their borders. The moment you step upon the mountain you are already being watched, waiting for you to take one step too far.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each land card in your graveyard.
[i]Froggy Braves the Wind[/i] — Whenever Suwako attacks, untap up to three lands.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The native god of the Moriya shrine, she ruled over her lands until centuries ago when Kanako, one of the gods of the nascent Japanese empire, defeated her in battle and claimed the shrine for her own.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Flash
Flying
When Aya enters, choose one —
• Tap target creature.
• Untap target creature.
• Draw a card.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“We received an intruder alert, and for some reason they called me onto the job...”[/i]

cards.rules_text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.
